Special Effect Flags

Mini-bossYes
Rare modeRandom rare effect enabledThis enemy can roll from the rare-effect families exposed by the client cache.
Effect poolAttacker, Defender, Legend, Speeder
Loot source modelNo enemy/spawner loot link in client cache

Enabled rare families: Attacker - The name suggests an offense-oriented rare roll. The client cache does not expose the exact damage or refire multiplier. | Defender - The name suggests a survivability-oriented rare roll. The client cache does not expose the exact HP, shield, armor, or resistance multiplier. | Legend - A distinct rare family used by high-tier named enemies. The client cache exposes the flag but not the exact stat formula behind it. | Speeder - The name suggests a movement-focused rare roll. The client cache does not expose the exact speed or chase-range multiplier.
